## Checklist

- [ ] One focused change per PR
- [ ] No project-specific references (no company names, customer names, specific repo URLs other than this one)
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added under `[Unreleased]` if user-visible
- [ ] If this changes an agent or skill: I've smoke-tested it in a scratch install
- [ ] If this is a substantive change (new role / new skill / change to loop, modes, or promotion rules): an issue exists and the approach was discussed there
